name: Tech Innovators Club
description: Build, code, and innovate. We host hackathons, workshops, and industry meetups to help students break into tech.

name: Photography Society
description: Capture moments that matter. From portrait to street photography, we nurture talent at every level with monthly shoots and critiques.

name: Entrepreneurship Hub
description: Turn your ideas into ventures. We connect student founders with mentors, investors, and resources to launch real businesses.

name: Debate & Public Speaking
description: Sharpen your argumentation, public speaking, and critical thinking. We compete in national and international debate tournaments.

name: Environmental Action Club
description: Driving campus sustainability and climate awareness. We run clean-up drives, tree-planting campaigns, and policy advocacy.

name: Music & Performing Arts
description: Express yourself through music, dance, and drama. Open to all skill levels. We perform at every major campus event.

name: Finance & Investment Society
description: Learn about markets, personal finance, and investment strategies. We run a simulated stock portfolio and invite industry speakers.

name: Wellness & Mental Health Club
description: A safe space for mental well-being, stress management, and mindfulness. We host yoga sessions, therapy talks, and support groups.

name: Robotics & Engineering Club
description: Design and build robots that solve real problems. We participate in regional and national robotics competitions every year.

name: Cultural Exchange Society
description: Celebrate campus diversity through food, fashion, language and cultural events. Over 30 nationalities represented.

name: Creative Writing Guild
description: Fiction, poetry, journalism — we do it all. Monthly writing workshops, literary magazine publication, and guest author talks.

name: Sports & Athletics Union
description: From football to swimming, athletics to basketball — we champion sports excellence and healthy competition on campus.
